name: Chester Nimitz
longDesc: Chester Nimitz est un général navale de qualité or — États-Unis. Données extraites du jeu — descriptions et conseils tactiques à confirmer.

skills.name: Camouflage
skills.desc: Able to dodge 6% damage from the enemy's air units

skills.name: Ace Forces
skills.desc: Experience gained by the army in combat increases by 60%

skills.name: Fleet Leader
skills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding ship units

skills.name: Knight of the Sea
skills.desc: When commanding ship units, morale will not diminish. When dealing a naval critical attack, increase damage by 40%. If a friendly carrier within 2 hexes or if the commander is deployed on a carrier, air strikes, missiles, and nuclear bombs deals +30% damage. All friendly aircraft carriers within 2 hexes gain +15% air strike damage.
skills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).

skills.name: Deep Blue Resolve
skills.desc: While commanding ship units, there is a 64% chance to deal a critical attack when attacking or launching airstrikes. (If the general has this skill, the effects of Fleet Leader and Airforce Leader are inapplicable.)
skills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).

stages.label: Entraînement final
stages.notes: Slots max : 5. Coût additionnel : 0 médailles, 100 mérite.

training.summary: Entraînement premium débloquant des compétences signature et augmentant les plafonds d'attributs.

sources: Données extraites de l'APK World Conqueror 4
